text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nikkeiiii Shinshun Haiii! Let's goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first race of the senior year is the Nikkei
Shinshun Hai, and Mejiro Palmer is extremely
pumped.
choice_data_list: What's got into you all of a sudden?
What's got into you all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nothing! I just thought I should treat this whole
day like a party!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Especially considering how, let's say...
half-hearted I was last year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, with the whole freaking out midway
and just letting things play out thing. So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm bringin' it today! I'm gonna be in everyone's
face right out the gate! That's how I do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the first graded race of the year, and Mejiro
Palmer seems ready to wager everything on her
brand-new image.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Time to hit the paddock and do this thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's go, bestie! Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey, Palmster! ☆ Just follow the plan and
you'll definitely slay this race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Daitaku Helios is already picking up
on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is in the paddock, and it's finally
time to really get the party started.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mejirooo! Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I-I guess they're a bit surprised. Fair enough. This
is probably the first time any Mejiro Umamusume
has introduced themselves with "Mejirooo!
Waheeey!")

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(But that doesn't matter. I'm gonna do things my
way!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What's good, everyone?! Are you ready to party?!
Or are ya out there, snoozin'?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If you're snoozin', you'd better wake up 'cause
this race is gonna melt your face! Don't doubt the
power of the wahey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Who needs another snoozefest of a race?! Not
me! Forget boring, lame performances!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna ramp the energy here up to eleven
straight out the gate, so I wanna hear you makin'
some noooise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do this thing! This Mejiro's gonna
slaaay! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A faint cheer follows her introduction. Half of the
spectators appear stunned. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Eh, that's good enough for now. Not everyone's
on board yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I'm just getting started! They'll be right there
with me once I start slayin'! Just you watch,
Trainer!
